user_query: I'm organizing a road trip with my family and we want to listen to some good music. Find a playlist on Soundcloud with a collection of popular songs from different genres. Additionally, suggest some kid-friendly songs and provide the lyrics for a sing-along.

TaskList.description: Search Soundcloud for a playlist that includes popular songs from various genres suitable for a family road trip.
Identify and compile a list of kid-friendly songs for the road trip.
Fetch the lyrics for the identified kid-friendly songs for a sing-along session.
